title: Tests + docs + acceptance checklist (Info DSL)
description: Add/expand tests and Sphinx docs for Info DSL and update acceptance checklist references.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Automated coverage for Info DSL landed; awaiting manual real-device acceptance for ping-pong clock/info display with multi-row/table layout before closure.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying font-showcase UX tweaks from live testing: default text color to sand-8 and reorder font-list display sequence to Bytesized/Micro5/Tiny5/Jersey10/Jersey15.
